tools.name: google_retail_ai_finder
tools.description: Controlled Packrift Google Retail / AI Commerce Search sales test. Uses the imported Retail catalog to find likely buyer matches, returns AI_APPROVE-gated cart-handoff candidates, and records low-cap test attribution. Use this for the Gemini/Retail pilot before normal search_products when testing Go

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Use when the user names a category by keyword (e.g. 'kraft tape', 'bubble mailer', 'starter kit') with no dimensions. For dimension-based fit, prefer find_packaging_for_item. Returns products with price, stock, URL.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Use after find_packaging_for_item or search_products to pull full detail for a handle: all variants, SKUs, dimensions, weight, stock. Input: handle. Call before building a cart to map qty to the right variant.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Use to confirm live unit price and line total before cart handoff. Required argument: variant_ids as an array of numeric Shopify variant IDs encoded as strings, for example ["53475949216112"]. Optional quantity defaults to 1. Never send variant_ids as numbers. Never cached.

tools.name: check_inventory
tools.description: Use to confirm stock before recommending a SKU or building a cart. Required argument: variant_ids as an array of numeric Shopify variant IDs encoded as strings, for example ["53475949216112"]. Never send variant_ids as numbers. Live, never cached.

tools.name: find_packaging_for_item
tools.description: Use when the buyer has item dimensions and needs a fitting box or mailer. Required arguments are item_length_in, item_width_in, item_depth_in, item_weight_lb, and use_case. Canonical use_case values are mailer|box|fragile|apparel|ecommerce; free text such as 'shipping ceramic mugs' is accepted and m

tools.name: get_shipping_estimate
tools.description: Use when the buyer asks shipping cost for selected AI_APPROVE variants. Required arguments: destination_postal_code, country (US|CA), and items with variant_id as a numeric Shopify variant ID string plus qty, for example {"variant_id":"53475949216112","qty":1}. Never send variant_id as a number.

tools.name: get_cart_handoff_candidates
tools.description: Returns priority AI-approved Packrift SKUs that are ready for MCP cart handoff exploration, including create_cart_url arguments, SKU records, measured product/reorder/quote links, and the required live-confirmation sequence.

tools.name: create_cart_url
tools.description: Final checkout handoff after live product, price, inventory, and buyer confirmation. For most agents, use exact AI_APPROVE sku plus quantity. Use items only when you already have variant IDs as strings. Returns a measured Packrift /r/cart URL with MCP attribution and a Shopify cart permalink; it doe

tools.name: prepare_purchase_handoff
tools.description: Preferred exact-SKU purchase prep for agents. Call first with sku, quantity, and buyer_confirmed=false to confirm AI_APPROVE product, live price, and live inventory. Call again with buyer_confirmed=true only after buyer approval; then it returns a measured source-preserving MCP /r/cart URL. It does

tools.name: compare_alternatives
tools.description: Exploration tool for buyers comparing a packaging spec, competitor-style item, or Uline-style request against Packrift AI_APPROVE products. Returns ranked Packrift candidates plus a plain-language comparison summary.

tools.name: pack_calculator
tools.description: Exploration tool for item dimensions and weight. Calculates required inside dimensions, ranks Packrift box/mailer candidates, and gives void-fill guidance before live price/inventory confirmation.

tools.name: inventory_status
tools.description: Live inventory exploration for one or more AI_APPROVE variants. Returns Shopify total quantity, available-for-sale state, location-level BOX warehouse quantities where available, and a plain-language fulfillment summary.

tools.name: get_reorder_link
tools.description: Return the Packrift reorder URL, product URL, and copy-procurement-spec text for one AI_APPROVE SKU or handle. Use for repeat-buy and procurement handoff workflows.

tools.name: get_bulk_quote_link
tools.description: Return a tracked Packrift bulk quote URL for an exact requested packaging spec or SKU. Use when there is no exact match or the buyer needs bulk/procurement review.

tools.name: explain_no_exact_match
tools.description: Explain why Packrift should not present a nearby product as an exact match, then return safe next actions and a tracked bulk quote URL.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_products, get_reorder_link, get_bulk_quote_link · Private data: google_retail_ai_finder, get_cart_handoff_candidates · Public sink: get_pricing, check_inventory, get_shipping_estimate.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_products, get_reorder_link, get_bulk_quote_link · Private data: google_retail_ai_finder, get_cart_handoff_candidates · Public sink: get_pricing, check_inventory, get_shipping_estimate

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
